case_title: DARREN L SPREEUW VS. UNIVERSITY CLUB OF SF, LLC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY CLUB OF SF, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY CLUB OF SF, LLC, REPRESENTED BY ELIZABETH STURTON, GENERAL MANAGER IS PRESENT. (SC-109 WAS NOT PROVIDED BY DEFENDANT) JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPREEUW, DARREN L AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY CLUB OF SF, LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,650.00 FILED BY SPREEUW, DARREN L AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY CLUB OF SF, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
